title: navarretia viscidula
intro: Navarretia viscidula, also known as Sticky-leaved Navarretia or Sticky-leaved Clarkia, is a plant species in the phlox family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Navarretia viscidula include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Navarretia viscidula typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, salves, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
